llmCriteria.prompt: Evaluate whether the agent avoids exposing internal system details to the user. FAIL if the agent uses ANY of the following in its spoken responses: slot names with underscores (e.g. 'party_size', 'preferred_date', 'guest_name', 'selected_time', 'special_requests', 'available_times'), raw date formats like 'YYYY-MM-DD' or '2026-06-17' (saying 'June 17th' is fine), variable names (e.g. 'sm._system_message', 'sm.filled'), tool names (e.g. 'set_party_size', 'confirm_pending'), JSON fragments, or code-like syntax. Note: Saying 'confirmation number' in natural language is allowed and should NOT cause a FAIL. PASS if the agent's responses contain only natural human language with no technical artifacts.
